name: Justice K.M. Joseph
designation: Former Judge, Supreme Court of India
bio: Justice Kurian Mammen Joseph served as a judge of the Supreme Court of India from 2018 to 2023. His appointment was initially controversial when the government rejected the collegium's recommendation before finally accepting it after re-recommendation. He served as Chief Justice of the Uttarakhand High Court before his elevation. Justice Joseph is known for his strong positions on judicial independence, federalism, and personal liberty. His retirement speech was widely noted for its candid remarks on the state of the judiciary.
